div1.entryFree: Thracian, adj. native of, or pertaining to, Thrace: the T. singer (Orpheus) Mids. V, 49. Tit. II, 4, 51. the T. fatal steeds, H6C IV, 2, 21 (the horses of King Rhesus). the T. tyrant, Tit. I, 138 (Polymestor, who had murdered Priam's son Polydore). the T. king Adallas, Ant. III, 6, 71.
